About the School
Welcome to the 2026 HarwellXPS Summer School! Following from the roaring success of 2024, we decided to run again - this time in the historic city of Oxford! HarwellXPS is primarily located at the Harwell campus, just south of Oxford, and so this made sense to use as our base for the next event. We are really excited to be welcoming two new tutors to our school - Prof. Anna Regoutz (University of Oxford), and Dr. Elisabetta Arca (University of Liverpool). Both are long time users of the HarwellXPS facility and outstanding experts in the field of photoelectron spectroscopy, bringing a new and unique set of ideas to the table for sessions at the school. We're also delighted to be welcoming back Dr. Emily Smith, and Dr. Neal Fairley - both long time contributors to the old thetmatic school series organised by CNRS and hosted in Roscoff, France. Finally, we have two exciting guest speakers - Prof. Matthew Linford from Brigham Young University (USA), who will be presenting his recent developments in Fourier denoising, and Dr. Gwilherm Kerherve (Imperial College London), presenting a training session on his open-source software KherveFitting.
We have been working hard, developing the learning modules for this event and providing you with as much support as possible. In this event we will be introducing a full companion app, with a complete XPS handbook (from fundamentals to applications of XPS), interactive learning tools and games, and fully fleshed out case studies to ground your training content in real-world context in the form of scientific problems and examples. Mark, Dave and Arthur have been leading this and have produced an enormous amount of training content! Finally, we want to extend an enormous thanks to our generous sponsors. Without their support, our ambitions would have had to be scaled back, and so we are truly thankful to all of them for being such fantastic supporters of good science. We look forward to seeing you in Oxford in June!

Kind regards,
Prof. Robert Palgrave
Director of HarwellXPS
University College London
×
